description: The GridContainer component allows for placing facets in a grid format and storing them under a container.

fields.EditMode: Whether this grid container is currently being edited (UI edit mode)
fields.FacetsRoot: Where to put facets when they are placed on the grid.
fields._background: The UIX rectangle that specifies what the background is.
fields._content: The UIX rectangle for the content like facets.
fields._overlay: The UIX rectangle for the grid Overlay when editing.
fields.RecalculateOnSizeChange: Whether to recalculate the facets on size change of the canvas.
fields.CellCount: The forced cell count of this grid container.
fields.CellSize: How big each cell is in pixels.
fields.Padding: How much padding between facets there should be.
fields._lastCalculatedCenteringOffset: The last centering offset calculated by this component, if at all.
fields._lastCalculatedCellSize: The last cell size calculated by this component, if at all. Created when ``CellCount`` is specified.
fields._lastCalculatedPadding: The last calculated padding between facets if at all.

methods.CopyFacetLayout: Copies the facet layout to the clipboard for debugging purposes.
